register.title: Sign up for AITrans.Video
register.subtitle: Sign up with your phone number by default, or switch to email

login.title: Log in to AITrans.Video
login.subtitlePassword: Log in with phone or email and password
login.subtitlePhone: Log in with a phone verification code

phoneForm.phonePlaceholder: Enter your mainland China phone number
phoneForm.setPasswordHint: Setting a password completes registration and automatically grants your free trial.
phoneForm.toastPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least {min} characters
phoneForm.toastInvalidRegToken: Invalid registration token, please start over
phoneForm.toastCaptchaLoading: Verification is still loading, please try again shortly

emailForm.sendCodeHint: Email registration verifies your email first, then sets a login password.
emailForm.registerNote: Email registration creates a standard free account; the free trial still requires phone registration and verification.
emailForm.toastCaptchaLoading: Verification is still loading, please try again shortly
emailForm.toastPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least {min} characters
emailForm.toastRegTokenExpired: Email verification expired, please verify again
emailForm.toastEmailVerified: Email verified — please set a login password

passwordLogin.accountPlaceholder: Enter your phone number or email
passwordLogin.errorCsrfOriginRejected: Origin check failed. Make sure you're visiting {url}, then refresh the page and try again.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.subtitle: Reset your login password with a phone or email verification code
forgot.phonePlaceholder: Enter the phone number you registered with
forgot.emailPlaceholder: Enter the email you registered with
forgot.footnote: Both a phone number and a verified email can be used to reset your password.
forgot.toastPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least {min} characters
forgot.toastResetSuccess: Password reset — you're logged in automatically

captcha.resultIncomplete: Verification result incomplete, please try again
captcha.notPassed: Verification didn't pass, please try again
captcha.loadFailed: Verification failed to load, please try again
captcha.componentLoadFailed: Verification component failed to load, please refresh and try again
captcha.timeout: Verification timed out, please try again
captcha.startFailed: Verification failed to start, please try again
captcha.turnstileError: Verification incomplete, please retry with the widget below
captcha.turnstileUnsupported: Your browser doesn't support verification, please use the system browser
captcha.turnstileInitFailed: Verification failed to initialize, please refresh and try again
captcha.turnstileLoadFailed: Verification failed to load, please refresh and try again
